programme.title: Spacehunter Adventures in the Forbidden Zone
programme.desc: A crash-landed salvager Peter Strauss meets a waif Molly Ringwald and saves women from a cyborg Michael Ironside on Terra 11

programme.title: BMX Bandits
programme.desc: A gang planning a bank heist target a group of BMX enthusiasts after the latter threaten to jeopardise the heist However the cyclists secretly help the police to sabotage the gangs sinister plot

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: TBH 121
programme.desc: TBH 121

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe wants to get rid of the Cannonball Express in Hooterville so he begins to harass Floyd and Charley Kate finds a way stop Bedloe

programme.title: Munsters 222
programme.desc: Munsters 222

programme.title: Addams 220
programme.desc: Addams 220

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac worries that young Stephanie on probation working in the gift shop is stealing jewelry Henpecked Fred feels his girlfriend Christine is pressuring him into marriage before hes ready Widower Woody and son Alan both fall for Libby

programme.title: Daktari 301
programme.desc: Daktari 301

programme.title: Arizona Days
programme.desc: Arizona Days

programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid Roy Rogers stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds the man who killed his brother Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup Bob Steele the Kid takes a job as the saloons bouncer While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison Pauline Moore the Kid discovers a swindled miner Noah Beery Jr who claims to be the Carson City Kid

programme.title: Phantom Rancher
programme.desc: Cowboy puts on a black mask and a black outfit to fight a gang of land-grabbing crooks

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After accidentally assaulting a mime obnoxious radio DJ Rick Rake is tormented by the mime Meanwhile it turns out that the mime is also a burglar who learns that the last people he robbed were also killed

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno and Sam are a pair of hardcore gamblers who dont play for fun They challenge each other in a simple game of cards and the end result could be deadlier then they couldve ever bargained for

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The gold-digging landowner of a Caribbean villa attempts to woo a haughty rich young woman with the aid of a potion made by his ex-lover; a voodoo priestess But trouble ensues when he ignores the warnings about the potion

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A troubled investigator looks into the suicide of a priest in an abandoned convent

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Ambitious first-time film director Alex Nolan is having trouble eliciting a good and believable performance out of lovely but inexperienced lead actress Leda Bedell Alex decides to use unorthodox methods to coax more credible and effective acting from Leda for the crucial final scene of the horror movie theyre working on together

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A hostage incident takes Nick back to Berlin in 1966

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A commercial psychic uses a mystic hearing aid to read the thoughts of his audience

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter receives anonymous love letters

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: verybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa pretends to be able to read so he can vote against an uppity female politician

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets struck with jealousy because of Flora MacMichael and tries to take it out on her apple tree

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When the seven lady truckers are kidnapped to drug kingpin Leonard Markers San Pepe compound BJ Fred and Hatsie Tipton and a very unlikely ally team up to rescue them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur bets an old college rival 5 bills that Ed can out-jump his horse He has second thoughts after he realizes that 5 bills equals 500

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol and Wilbur convert the barn into a temporary polling precinct so Ed wants to vote too

programme.title: Hogans 326
programme.desc: Hogans 326

programme.title: Hogans 318
programme.desc: Hogans 318

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew devise a plan - Potentially beneficial to both them and Captain Binghamton - To have a popular movie star put on a show on Taratupa for Admiral Rogers but must first scheme to get the Stars stubborn Tour Manager out of the way

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress an Admiral Binghamton drops some serious charges against the 73 Crew in return for a show of their high esteem for their Commander in the form of a testimonial dinner Knowing that no one will attend the dinner willingly McHale and The Boys plan to combine the dinner with a big crap game in order to have a showing for the most hated Commanding Officer in the Pacific

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD try to stop Gadget from attending the International Congress of Policemen in London

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget must protect the Poot-Ta-Foots treasure

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: WKRP 204

programme.title: WKRP 214
programme.desc: WKRP 214

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Cousin Alvin billy bob Thornton comes to town and he and wood get into some legal trouble

programme.title: Timerider The Adventure of Lyle Swann
programme.desc: Motorcycle racer Lyle Swann Fred Ward is cruising through the Mexican desert when he accidentally stumbles into a time-travel experiment and finds himself transported back to the Old West of the 1870s There he encounters an attractive local woman Belinda Bauer and a gang of criminals led by Porter Reese Peter Coyote Lyles motorized bike is impressive in the past -- until it runs out of gas Now Lyle must rely on his wits to take care of business and return to his own time

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The FBI approaches Uncle Jesse to allow Boss to stay at the Duke farm since he is a key witness in an upcoming trial for one of the Souths most notorious racketeers The reason is because the mob boss has placed a huge bounty on Boss head and has hitmen all over Hazzard County who will stop at nothing to prevent him from testifying While Boss is in hiding Rosco takes over his little fat buddys administrative duties relishing the absolute authority that comes with the job

programme.title: Hercules 106
programme.desc: Hercules 106

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Elijah Good a doctor from an Amish community asks Boone for help with some unexpected deaths They might have to do with a Taelon-related disease

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Kinkaids brother Max had disappeared during their last mission prior to Kinkaid running into the Blackwood team Now the team stumbles across an imprisoned Max while infiltrating an alien stronghold and rescue him Unknown to the team Max has been transformed into a Robocop-like entity programmed to execute Kinkaid

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Dr Russells presumed-dead husband mysteriously reappears on a reconnaissance mission to a nearby planet

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked to lead a group of guardhouse prisoners on a mission to rescue two girls taken captive by the Kiowa He questions the odds or whether the girls will want to return The mission starts okay but his fears may be true

programme.title: Young 319
programme.desc: Young 319

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A single girl named Barbara has a baby and is then told the baby was stillborn However she thinks it is alive and starts asking questions at the unwed mothers home where she lived

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A cocky sleazy and horny late night talk radio host brings in a sexy female guest who claims the aliens gave her the solution to evil in the world - a monster that eats bad people who agree to it He laughs it off at first

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Gannon and Friday visit a self-described guru who advocates mind-expansion through drugs Brother William is suspected of giving or selling LSD to minors The detectives debate their ideas of drug use with the suspect

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are asked by a woman from Oregon to try to find her niece who has run away from home Their search eventually leads them into the world of pornography and they soon become involved in the arrest of a pornographer who may have info on where she might be located

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While working as a delivery driver Kimble rescues a man and a woman from the wreckage of a small airplane All three have a problem the man is a politician the woman is not his wife and Kimble doesnt want publicity as the rescuer

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath risks his life and saves a man who is a notorious hired gunman The irony is the killer has a contract to kill Heath put out by a local rancher with a grudge

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne must fight a Comanche Indian chief in swallowing sand to save a wagon load of people who banded together under various circumstances They are stranded with no hope of rescue or supplies First one who yells out for help loses

programme.title: Music Scene
programme.desc: In My Dreams Music and Video by Ted Cobena Rock and roll video show S01e06 BeachBilly Lifestyle Official Video by Kyle Coulahan Your girls giving ultimatums Im"

programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Night of the Demons
programme.desc: Night of the Demons is a 1988 American supernatural horror film directed by Kevin S Tenney written and produced by Joe Augustyn and starring Amelia Kinkade Cathy Podewell Linnea Quigley Hal Havins and Alvin Alexis

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The root which only responds to Audric or something belonging to him reacts to the Planet Xiang which leads Jayce and Herc there even though it is a planet controlled by Saw Boss They discover a message from Audric on a vase but before they can get it it is stolen Jayce and Herc and Oon are drawn further into the city where Saw Boss has laid a trap for Jayce Jayce and Oon fall into a pit which is slowly being consumed by fire; but Herc Gillian and Flora come to the rescue Safely aboard the Pride they decode the message which is revealed to be too old to be of much use

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian tells the story of Valroth a powerful weapons maker who made living armor to protect his people many years ago But the armor became too powerful and it was all destroyed except for the helmet Jayce seeks the helmet finds it and after putting it on his power is invincible He easily defeats some monster minds But the helmet is wicked and it takes over Jayces body Jayce and the power of light conquer the evil helmet and then they destroy it

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Mayhem is obsessed with finding Caesars sword beneath the catacombs of Rome as it is supposed to make him invincible

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A millionaire has hired VENOM to steal a machine that can cause ultra sonic vibrations The millionaire wants to become vice president of the Netherlands and if his demands are not met he will destroy all of Hollands dykes He only wanted to bluff -- too bad Mayhem never bluffs

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: A Decisive Battle!! Axe

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Decayed Body

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain try to derail MADs plan to steal an entire train carrying sophisticated computers that will help their operation

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to infiltrate MADs laboratory that is producing a sleeping gas so powerful that it will send everyone in the world to fall asleep
